scene.lines: Torvald, you mustn’t be angry with me, but I’ve done something that I hope you’ll forgive.
Nora, what is it you’ve done now? You know how I dislike secrets and deceit in this house.
I borrowed some money, Torvald. I did it to save your health, to keep you from worrying about your work.
You… borrowed money? Without my knowledge? Nora, you know how dangerous that could be for us.
I know, Torvald. But I had no choice. I couldn’t let you suffer. It was for your sake alone.
Nora, you must understand that honesty is the foundation of our home. Secrets like this… they shake everything.
I understand now, Torvald, and I promise never to do anything like this again. Please believe that my heart was only in the right place.
I do believe you, Nora, but we must face this together. There can be no more hidden deeds between us.
